en_title: Marvel's Wolverine Gets Brand New Gameplay at Sony's State of Play Showcase
cn_title: 《索尼》《漫威金刚狼》State of Play实机演示公布
subtitle: 狼爪出鞘
opus_summary: 在索尼State of Play发布会上，Insomniac Games展示了《漫威金刚狼》的实机玩法。视频中，金刚狼追踪线索，与机械强化敌人激战，并与琴·格雷联手营救被绑架的Morlocks。游戏为线性叙事动作游戏，强调快速击杀和剧情推进，将于2026年9月15日登陆PS5，暂不登陆PC。

paragraphs.en: Marvel’s Wolverine appeared during Sony’s State of Play broadcast, as expected, showing off fresh gameplay for Insomniac’s upcoming PS5 exclusive.
paragraphs.cn: 正如预期，《漫威金刚狼》在索尼State of Play直播中亮相，展示了Insomniac Games这款即将推出的PS5独占游戏的全新实机玩法。

paragraphs.en: The extensive gameplay reveal showed Logan chasing down a lead in an area packed with cybernetically enhanced enemies who have kidnapped the Morlocks, including Leech. After beginning the combat sequence with some stealth kills, Wolverine goes all out, dispatching enemies in brutal melee, stabbing foes repeatedly with his adamantium claws and building up a rage meter. As we know, Marvel’s Wolverine is a violent game, and the combat we see in the gameplay reinforces that.
paragraphs.cn: 这段详尽的实机演示中，洛根在满是机械强化敌人的区域追踪线索——这些敌人绑架了包括李奇在内的Morlocks。战斗以潜行击杀开场，随后金刚狼火力全开，用残忍的近战方式解决敌人，反复用艾德曼合金爪刺穿对手，同时积攒怒气槽。众所周知，《漫威金刚狼》是一款暴力游戏，而实机中的战斗场面进一步印证了这一点。

paragraphs.en: Eventually, Jean Grey turns up and she and Wolverine work together to defeat more enemies, occasionally joining forces for a co-op finisher. It turns out Jean Grey is also working to save the Morlocks, but they can’t prevent the mutants from being driven away in the back of a van. At this point the action transitions into a convoy chase, with Wolverine leaping from vehicle to vehicle as he tries to save the Morlocks. Here we can see a moment where the player mashes the Square button to use Wolverine’s famous Healing Factor ability.
paragraphs.cn: 随后，琴·格雷登场，与金刚狼联手击败更多敌人，偶尔还会合作施展双人终结技。原来琴·格雷也在设法营救Morlocks，但他们未能阻止变种人被押上货车带走。此时，动作场面转入车队追逐战，金刚狼在车辆间跳跃穿梭，试图救出Morlocks。这里可以看到玩家猛按方块键，触发金刚狼著名的自愈因子能力。

paragraphs.en: After a dramatic leap into the vehicle carrying the Morlocks, Wolverine soaks up plenty of damage before the gameplay comes to an end. But extended footage shows a number of other well-known characters who also appears in the game, such as Sabretooth, Omega Red, Mystique, and Sentinels.
paragraphs.cn: 在戏剧性地跃入载有Morlocks的车辆后，金刚狼承受了大量伤害，实机演示随之结束。但更长的片段还展示了游戏中出现的其他知名角色，如剑齿虎、欧米伽红、魔形女和哨兵机器人。

paragraphs.en: The mission here shows gameplay that is very different to Insomniac's Spider-Man games, which are open-world adventures. Wolverine, on the other hand, is a narrative driven, linear action game, and while you can dabble with stealth, the focus is very much on killing as quickly as possible, and holding onto the story for dear life.
paragraphs.cn: 本关的玩法与Insomniac的《蜘蛛侠》系列开放世界冒险截然不同。《金刚狼》是一款叙事驱动的线性动作游戏，虽然可以尝试潜行，但核心还是尽可能快地击杀敌人，并紧紧抓住剧情不放。

paragraphs.en: Marvel's Wolverine launches on September 15, 2026 as one of Sony’s big PS5 exclusives. And don’t expect it to come out on PC, either — Sony is keeping its single-player narrative games PlayStation exclusive from now on. You can currently preorder the game at Amazon or the PlayStation Store.
paragraphs.cn: 《漫威金刚狼》将于2026年9月15日发售，作为索尼重要的PS5独占作品之一。也别指望它会登陆PC——索尼今后将把单人叙事游戏保留为PlayStation独占。目前可在亚马逊或PlayStation商店预购本作。

paragraphs.en: Here's everything announced at State of Play June 2026 if you need a catch up on what PlayStation has in store. And check out our interview with Insomniac to find out exactly how Marvel's Wolverine plays .
paragraphs.cn: 如果你想了解PlayStation的后续计划，这里汇总了2026年6月State of Play公布的所有内容。另外，请查看我们对Insomniac的专访，深入了解《漫威金刚狼》的具体玩法。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
